summary: For example certain Life Path may grant poverty-stricken

mechanics.name_guess: For example certain Life Path may grant poverty-stricken
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 024 > npcs > For example certain Life Path may grant poverty-stricken
mechanics.excerpt: For example certain Life Path may grant poverty-stricken char- acter the Wealth Trait: Any time character receives trait mutually exclusive of trait he or she already has the traits cancel each other out. character with the Poverty Trait who receives the Wealth Trait does not become wealthy; but instead loses the Poverty Trait_ If the character gets Wealth again later in the Life Path, he then receives the Wealth Trait.
